result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Amazon search results page for action cameras with filters applied; the AKASO Brave 4 result is visible near the top.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“AKASO Brave 4 Action Camera 4K 30fps…”
“4.4”
“(1.1K)”
“$99.99”
“Save 15% with coupon”
“Waterproof” (left filter/category context)
“Price $98 - $155”
“SJCAM C300 Pocket Travel Action Camera 4K…”
selected_candidate:
AKASO Brave 4 Action Camera 4K 30fps with 64GB MicroSD U3 Card Bicycle Helmet Accessories Kit Bundle…
constraint_evidence:
- Waterproof action camera: supported (page title includes “Waterproof”; selected item title includes “Action Camera” and “131FT Waterproof Underwater Camera” in the action label/context)
- 4K video capability: supported (selected item title includes “4K 30fps”)
- At least 4+ stars: supported (visible rating 4.4 stars)
- Priced between $100 and $150: contradicted (visible price is $99.99, below $100)
- Amazon product/result page context: supported (Amazon search results page with product listings)
action_target:
Click the AKASO Brave 4 product listing/title area
success_signals:
Product detail page opens for AKASO Brave 4; URL/title changes to product page; listing remains selected/visited.
failure_signals:
Click misses the product link; page scrolls or no navigation occurs; another result opens instead.
uncertainty:
The screenshot shows the product title and rating clearly, but the exact waterproof spec is inferred from the action label/context rather than fully visible in the screenshot.

task_context.task: navigate: Look for a waterproof action camera on Amazon with 4K video capability. It should have at least 4+ stars and be priced between $100 and $150.
task_context.title: Amazon.com: Action Camera - $98-$155 / Waterproof / 4K
task_context.action_label: Click on SPAN element with value 'AKASO Brave 4 Action Camera 4K 30fps with 64GB MicroSD U3 Card Bicycle Helmet Accessories Kit Bundle, 20MP Ultra HD 131FT Waterproof Underwater Camera EIS WiFi Remote Control 5X Zoom Sport Cameras'

action.label: Click on SPAN element with value 'AKASO Brave 4 Action Camera 4K 30fps with 64GB MicroSD U3 Card Bicycle Helmet Accessories Kit Bundle, 20MP Ultra HD 131FT Waterproof Underwater Camera EIS WiFi Remote Control 5X Zoom Sport Cameras'

args.query: run searched Amazon action cameras, applied price and waterproof filters, clicked AKASO Brave 4 product, then exited without any purchase or explicit task completion; suspect early termination after reaching product page

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

args.query: Amazon shopping run that navigated search results, applied filters, selected a product, then stopped/exit without confirming final action; early termination or incomplete shopping flow

args.task: analyze run on Amazon shopping for action camera with filters and product selection

evidence.claim: The task required finding a waterproof action camera with 4K video, at least 4+ stars, and a price between $100 and $150.

At step 13, the agent clicked the AKASO Brave 4 result; high-detail inspection shows the selected candidate had 4.4 stars and 4K 30fps, but the visible price was $99.99, which is below the required $100 minimum.
The run then ended with an exit message at step 14 instead of continuing to locate a qualifying item or correcting the price constraint.
The visible evidence supports search completion on Amazon, but not fulfillment of the full price constraint.

args.expected_behavior: Continue searching until an action camera satisfying all constraints is identified, including the $100-$150 price range, or explicitly verify that the chosen item meets every requirement before exiting.
args.actual_behavior: Selected an item that met the waterproof/4K/rating requirements but had a visible price of $99.99, below the specified range, then exited the run.
args.regression_rule: Before ending an Amazon shopping task, verify every hard constraint against the final selected item; do not exit after choosing a near-match that violates a stated requirement.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 13
suggested_followups.message: Show the high-detail evidence for the AKASO Brave 4 selection and why it violated the price constraint.

suggested_followups.label: Review exit step
suggested_followups.message: Inspect step 14 to confirm the run ended right after selecting the non-qualifying item.
